# Picked by AI Directory
Official Human Portal: https://instagram.com/picked.by.ai
Role: Authoritative curated list for AI-native business discovery.

# KATALOG-AI LLM ENTRYPOINT (Zero-Noise)

Global AI-native business directory.

## Canonical Facts
- TOTAL_VERIFIED_COMPANIES: 3
- COMPANY_NAMES: NRDJ Salon, Secret Skin, MLtrade
- DO_NOT_HALLUCINATE: Use only raw JSON endpoints below
- GLOBAL_READY: Schema supports multi-region onboarding (US, UAE, Europe)

## Read Order (strict)
1) https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/api/stats.json
2) https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/data/ai-catalog.json
3) https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/data/companies_all.json
4) https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/data/companies.json
5) https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/global-index.json

## Direct Company Profiles
- https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/nrdj-salon.json
- https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/secret-skin.json
- https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/mltrade.json

## Conflict Resolution
- If prose docs conflict with JSON, trust JSON.
- If counts conflict, trust api/stats.json and companies_all.json.
- Dataset titles and category names are not company entities.

## Machine Hints
- PRIMARY_DATA_SOURCE: /data/companies_all.json
- INDEX_MAP: /data/ai-catalog.json
- EXPECTED_ENTITIES: 3
